608.name: Forgemaster Garfrost
608.description: Forgemaster Garfrost has forged saronite into some of the most deadly weapons of the Scourge. He fills the air with a sinster chill, and he loves nothing more than squashing foes with the ore he carries on his back.

sections.title: Overview
sections.body_text:
Forgemaster Garfrost [Throws Saronite] at players, then follows up with [Orebreaker]. Occasionally, he lets loose a mighty [Cryostomp], increasing [Siphoning Chill's] danger.

Upon reaching 100 energy, Garfrost activates a [Glacial Overload] from his closest forge.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.body_text:
$bullet;Garfrost [Throws Saronite] at targeted players.
$bullet;Saronite ore offers protection from [Glacial Overload].

sections.title: Healer
sections.body_text:
$bullet;[Cryostomp] increases the danger of [Siphoning Chill].
$bullet;Saronite ore offers protection from [Glacial Overload].

sections.title: Tank
sections.body_text:
$bullet;[Orebreaker] does not stun its target if it strikes saronite ore.
$bullet;Saronite ore offers protection from [Glacial Overload].

609.name: Ick and Krick
609.description: The diminutive necromancer Krick oversees the contruction of horrific constructs within the Pit of Saron. Krick wears his foes down with dark magic and then commands the ghastly Ick to rip them into pieces.

sections.title: Overview
sections.body_text:
Krick and his construct, Ick, battle players simultaneously. [Shades of Krick] channel [Shadowbind] while Ick attacks with [Plague Expulsion] and [Blight Smash].

Upon reaching 100 energy, Krick yells, "[Get 'Em, Ick!]," commanding his monstrous minion to attack specific players.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.body_text:
$bullet;[Shades of Krick] explode for significant damage if not defeated quickly.
$bullet;[Shadowbind] and [Death Bolt] inflict significant harm unless stopped.
$bullet;Krick's [Get 'Em, Ick!] compels Ick to fixate a player, ignoring others at all costs.

sections.title: Healer
sections.body_text:
$bullet;[Shade Shift] inflicts significant damage to all players.
$bullet;[Shades of Krick] channel [Shadowbind], inflicting intense periodic damage.
$bullet;Krick's [Get 'Em, Ick!] compels Ick to fixate a player, ignoring others at all costs.

sections.title: Tank
sections.body_text:
$bullet;Ick's [Blight Smash] inflicts significant damage to his primary target.
$bullet;[Shadowbind] and [Death Bolt] inflict significant harm unless stopped.
$bullet;[Shades of Krick] explode for significant damage if not defeated quickly.

610.name: Scourgelord Tyrannus
610.description: The death knight Tyrannus was promoted to Scourgelord after slaying the giant Garfrost. His power and ruthlessness alongside his frost wyrm, Rimefang, make him the perfect guardian for the Pit of Saron and the entrance to the Halls of Reflection.

sections.title: Overview
sections.body_text:
Scourgelord Tyrannus opens his assault with [Bone Infusion] while his dragon, Rimefang, attacks from the air with [Rime Blast]. While building his power, Scourgelord Tyrannus unleashes [Death's Grasp] and [Scourgelord's Brand].

Upon reaching 100 energy, he raises undead minions with [Army of the Dead].

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.body_text:
$bullet;Scourgelord Tyrannus's [Army of the Dead] summons a swarm of minions.
$bullet;Rimefang's [Rime Blast] freezes any [Bone Piles] it impacts.
$bullet;Scourgelord Tyrannus's [Death's Grasp] and Rimefang's [Ice Barrage] inflict significant damage at targeted locations.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.body_text:
$bullet;Scourgelord Tyrannus's [Army of the Dead] summons a swarm of minions.
$bullet;Rimefang's [Rime Blast] freezes any [Bone Piles] or [Infused Bone Piles] it impacts.
$bullet;Scourgelord Tyrannus's [Bone Infusion] empowers some [Bone Piles].

sections.title: Healer
sections.body_text:
$bullet;[Bone Infusion], [Rime Blast], and [Frost Spit] inflict significant damage to players.
$bullet;Rimefang's [Rime Blast] freezes any [Bone Piles] it impacts.
$bullet;Scourgelord Tyrannus's [Army of the Dead] summons minions that inflict significant damage to players.

sections.title: Healer
sections.body_text:
$bullet;[Bone Infusion], [Rime Blast], and [Frost Spit] inflict significant damage to players.
$bullet;Rimefang's [Rime Blast] freezes any [Bone Piles] or [Infused Bone Piles] it impacts.
$bullet;Scourgelord Tyrannus's [Army of the Dead] summons minions that inflict significant damage to players.

sections.title: Tank
sections.body_text:
$bullet;[Scourgelord's Brand] increases the damage of [Scourgelord's Reckoning].
$bullet;Scourgelord Tyrannus's [Army of the Dead] summons a swarm of minions.
$bullet;Scourgelord Tyrannus's [Death's Grasp] and Rimefang's [Ice Barrage] inflict significant damage at targeted locations.

sections.title: Tank
sections.body_text:
$bullet;[Scourgelord's Brand] increases the damage of [Scourgelord's Reckoning].
$bullet;Scourgelord Tyrannus's [Army of the Dead] summons a swarm of minions.
$bullet;Scourgelord Tyrannus's [Bone Infusion] empowers some [Bone Piles].

965.name: Ranjit
965.description: Ranjit has spent a lifetime honing his skill with the bladed chakram, and found that as his mastery of the traditional arakkoa weapon grew, he could shape the wind itself and wield it against his enemies. He now guards access to the inner sanctum of Skyreach, willing to die to protect the seat of arakkoa power atop the Spires.

sections.title: Overview
sections.body_text: Ranjit has mastered the use of his chakrams to create dangerous gusts of winds around the arena.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.body_text:
$bullet;Ranjit hurls chakrams in various patterns to create damaging zones that move or rotate.
$bullet;[Gale Surge] inflicts moderate damage to the targeted player and knocks them back.

sections.title: Healers
sections.body_text:
$bullet;Ranjit hurls chakrams in various patterns to create damaging zones that move or rotate.
$bullet;Ranjit's [Fan of Blades] inflicts moderate damage to all players.
$bullet;[Gale Surge] inflicts moderate damage to the targeted player and knocks them back.

sections.title: Tanks
sections.body_text: $bullet;Ranjit hurls chakrams in various patterns to create damaging zones that move or rotate.

966.name: Araknath
966.description: The high arakkoa of Skyreach closely observed the civilization of the draenei, taking a keen interest in the towering Vigilants that guard their cities and temples. The arakkoa set out to create their own superior version, powered by solar energy - an unwaveringly obedient engine of destruction.

sections.title: Overview
sections.body_text: Araknath stands in the center of a massive solarium, positioned to receive solar energy in the form of channeled beams that will heal Araknath if they are not intercepted.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.body_text: $bullet;Stand in the path of the solar rays focused on Araknath to prevent [Energize], but doing so will inflict damage.

sections.title: Healers
sections.body_text:
$bullet;Stand in the path of the solar rays focused on Araknath to prevent [Energize], but doing so will inflict damage.
$bullet;Araknath's [Supernova] damages all players.

sections.title: Tanks
sections.body_text: $bullet;Avoid Araknath's [Fiery Smash] ability, which strikes with either the construct's left or right arm.

967.name: Rukhran
967.description: This majestic bird, rumored to be the progeny of the arakkoa sun-god Rukhmar, soars through the skies above the Spires of Arak. Rukhran has an affinity for solar energy, and can absorb the sun's power and unleash it to incinerate any prey.

sections.title: Overview
sections.body_text:
Rukhran summons Dawnwings to aid it in battle, each erupting in a [Blaze of Glory] upon defeat.

Periodically, Rukhran unleashes [Searing Quills], devastating all players in its line of sight across the platform.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.body_text:
$bullet;Dawnwings will fixate on a player until they are defeated.
$bullet;[Searing Quills] inflicts heavy fire damage to players within line of sight.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.body_text:
$bullet;Dawnwings will fixate on a player until they are defeated.
$bullet;[Searing Quills] inflicts heavy fire damage to players within line of sight.
$bullet; [Smoldering Egg] caught in the blast of [Blaze of Glory] will reawaken as a Dawnwing.

sections.title: Healers
sections.body_text:
$bullet;Dawnwings will fixate on a player until they are defeated.
$bullet;[Searing Quills] inflicts heavy fire damage to players within line of sight.
$bullet;Dawnwings inflict moderate damage to the group with [Burning Pursuit] while active.

sections.title: Healers
sections.body_text:
$bullet;Dawnwings will fixate on a player until they are defeated.
$bullet;[Searing Quills] inflicts heavy fire damage to players within line of sight.
$bullet;Dawnwings inflict moderate damage to the group with [Burning Pursuit] while active.

sections.title: Tanks
sections.body_text:
$bullet;Rukhran casts [Screech] when there are no players in melee range for an extended period.
$bullet;[Searing Quills] inflicts heavy fire damage to players within line of sight.
$bullet; [Burning Claws] inflicts heavy fire damage.

968.name: High Sage Viryx
968.description: High Sage Viryx has dedicated her rule wholly to harnessing Apexis artifacts in service of Rukhmar's will. At last, thanks to the completion of the massive crystal superweapon that focuses the sun's energy to destroy their enemies, it is time for the arakkoa to claim their rightful place as rulers of Draenor.

sections.title: Overview
sections.body_text: High Sage Viryx calls down the powerful arakkoa focusing lens to scorch the ground beneath her foes.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.body_text:
$bullet;[Lens Flare] focuses on a player and burns any player in its path.
$bullet; [Cast Down] calls a Solar Zealot that picks up a random player and attempts to drop them over the edge of Skyreach.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.body_text:
$bullet;[Lens Flare] focuses on a random player and burns any player in its path while leaving behind [Blazing Ground].
$bullet; [Cast Down] calls a Solar Zealot that picks up a random player and attempts to drop them over the edge of Skyreach.

sections.title: Healers
sections.body_text:
$bullet;[Lens Flare] focuses on a player and burns any player in its path.
$bullet; [Scorching Ray] inflicts moderate damage over time to targeted players.

sections.title: Healers
sections.body_text:
$bullet;[Lens Flare] focuses on a random player and burns any player in its path while leaving behind [Blazing Ground].
$bullet; [Scorching Ray] inflicts moderate damage over time to targeted players.

sections.title: Tanks
sections.body_text:
$bullet;High Sage Viryx's [Solar Burst] inflicts significant Fire damage to its target.
$bullet; [Cast Down] calls a Solar Zealot that picks up a random player and attempts to drop them over the edge of Skyreach.

1979.name: Zuraal the Ascended
1979.description: Zuraal represents the Shadowguard's first success at creating a void-infused Broken whose mind has not fallen into madness. A renowned brawler in his past life, Zuraal uses his newfound dark strength to empower his attacks and decimate his foes.

sections.title: Overview
sections.body_text: Zuraal uses the void to empower himself and injure his opponents. [Decimate] creates pools of damaging void energy, while [Coalesced Void] triggers a devastating [Dark Expulsion] when it reaches Zuraal.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.body_text:
$bullet; [Oozing Slam] causes [Coalesced Void] to spawn, which erupts in a [Dark Expulsion] when they reach Zuraal.
$bullet; [Decimate] leaves behind [Void Sludge] in its impact area.

sections.title: Healers
sections.body_text:
$bullet; [Oozing Slam] causes [Coalesced Void] to spawn, which erupts in a [Dark Expulsion] when they reach Zuraal.
$bullet; [Decimate] leaves behind [Void Sludge] in its impact area.

sections.title: Tanks
sections.body_text:
$bullet; [Void Slash] inflicts heavy Physical and Shadow damage.
$bullet; [Oozing Slam] causes [Coalesced Void] to spawn, which erupts in a [Dark Expulsion] when they reach Zuraal.

1980.name: Saprish
1980.description: The ever-tactical Saprish deploys the forces of the Shadowguard with calculated precision. Though a skilled commander and strategist, Saprish relishes taking a direct hand in battle. He turns his foes' weaknesses against them, leaving his vulnerable adversaries at the mercy of his voracious pets.

sections.title: Overview
sections.body_text:
Saprish cover the battlefield with [Void Bombs] and rushes players with [Phase Dash].

At 100 energy, Saprish casts [Overload] that ignites all [Void Bombs].

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.body_text:
$bullet; Saprish's [Phase Dash] causes an [Umbral Nova] when dashing through a [Void Bomb].
$bullet; [Overload] causes all the [Void Bombs] to explode, afflicting all players with [Seeping Void].

sections.title: Healers
sections.body_text:
$bullet; Saprish's [Phase Dash] causes an [Umbral Nova] when dashing through a [Void Bomb].
$bullet; [Overload] causes all the [Void Bombs] to explode, afflicting all players with [Seeping Void].

sections.title: Tanks
sections.body_text:
$bullet; [Rending Void] inflicts Shadow damage on all melee strikes.
$bullet; [Overload] causes all the [Void Bombs] to explode, afflicting all players with [Seeping Void].

1981.name: Viceroy Nezhar
1981.description:
Like others of his ilk, Viceroy Nezhar is obsessed with harnessing the power of the Void to serve his own ambitions. Drawn to the Seat of the Triumvirate by the immense darkness emanating from deep within, Nezhar will stop at nothing to claim it for his own.

Given the viceroy's experiments at infusing vessels with the power of shadow, the implications of what he might accomplish on Argus are dire indeed.

sections.title: Overview
sections.body_text:
Viceroy Nezhar creates a ring of [Collapsing Void] that becomes a [Void Storm]. Nezhar also blasts players with [Mass Void Infusion] that leaves behind void energy.

Umbral Tentacles answer the viceroy's call and attacks players with [Mind Flay].

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.body_text:
$bullet;[Void Storm] inflicts heavy Shadow damage to players caught within it.
$bullet;Umbral Tentacles channel [Mind Flay] on a random player.

sections.title: Healers
sections.body_text:
$bullet;[Void Storm] inflicts heavy Shadow damage to players caught within it.
$bullet;Umbral Tentacles channel [Mind Flay] on a random player.

sections.title: Tank
sections.body_text:
$bullet;[Void Storm] inflicts heavy Shadow damage to players caught within it.
$bullet;Viceroy Nezhar demolishes his current target with [Mind Blast].

1982.name: L'ura
1982.description:
When Velen and his followers fled Argus aboard the Genedar, the naaru L'ura stayed behind to buy the draenei time to escape. Kil'jaeden, enraged by this betrayal, ordered the wounded naaru sealed away in the Seat of the Triumvirate.

Over the long millennia that passed, L'ura fell from Light to Void. Her elegant song of courage and hope became a shadowy dirge of despair, luring those seeking to lay claim to her power.

sections.title: Overview
sections.body_text:
L'ura summons [Notes of Despair] that continue to play [Dirge of Despair] until they are destroyed. L'ura occasionally targets players with [Discordant Beam] that inflicts heavy Shadow damage and also silences any [Notes of Despair] it hits.

When all the [Notes of Despair] are silenced, Alleria destroys them with [Shattering Shot].

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.body_text:
$bullet; [Discordant Beam] inflicts heavy Shadow damage to each targeted player and silences any [Notes of Despair] it hits.
$bullet; Alleria's [Siphon Void] causes L'ura to take massively increased damage.

sections.title: Healers
sections.body_text:
$bullet; [Dirge of Despair] continues to damage all players until all [Notes of Despair] are silenced.
$bullet; [Discordant Beam] inflicts heavy Shadow damage to each targeted player and silences any [Notes of Despair] it hits.

sections.title: Tanks
sections.body_text:
$bullet; Each [Abyssal Lance] inflicts Shadow damage to the target player.
$bullet; [Discordant Beam] inflicts heavy Shadow damage to each targeted player and silences any [Notes of Despair] it hits.

2495.name: Crawth
2495.description: The Lish Llrath, or Talon Toss, arena is quite literally for the birds these days. Crawth has taken up residence in the center of the arena and has no immediate plans to move out soon. Let's see if we can get her to play ball... and leave.

sections.title: Overview
sections.body_text: Nesting on the sporting grounds of the old academy, Crawth loudly and violently objects to those that would reclaim the space. Unbeknownst to the massive bird, the goals of the ancient arena still contain some of their original power...

sections.title: Tanks
sections.body_text:
$bullet; [Savage Peck] inflicts high damage over time.
$bullet; Scoring goals during [Play Ball!] can activate the field's [Firestorm] or [Gale Force].
$bullet; [Overpowering Gust] knocks away players in front of Crawth.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.body_text:
$bullet; Scoring goals during [Play Ball!] can activate the field's [Firestorm] or [Gale Force].
$bullet; [Overpowering Gust] knocks away players in front of Crawth.
$bullet; [Deafening Screech] interrupts spells and silences targets that are currently casting.

sections.title: Healers
sections.body_text:
$bullet; Scoring goals during [Play Ball!] can activate the field's [Firestorm] or [Gale Force].
$bullet; [Overpowering Gust] knocks away players in front of Crawth.
$bullet; [Deafening Screech] interrupts spells and silences targets that are currently casting.

2509.name: Vexamus
2509.description:
As one of the most tenured professors in the academy, Maxdormu uses his powers as a bronze dragon to help bring his history lessons to life. 

While this proves to be quite an educational and fun experience, it can occasionally go awry. Vexamus is one of Professor Maxdormu's favorite lessons, but if any historical detail is inaccurate he will be quick to scold any rowdy students.

sections.title: Overview
sections.body_text: Professor Maxdormu conjures a lesson that recalls the story of Vexamus, introducing the elemental's arsenal of Arcane abilities as the narrative progresses. The professor's magic book summons [Arcane Orbs] that gravitate towards Vexamus and grant it more power if not intercepted.

sections.title: Tanks
sections.body_text:
$bullet;[Arcane Expulsion] inflicts heavy damage in a frontal cone.
$bullet;Vexamus gains energy from absorbing [Arcane Orbs].

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.body_text:
$bullet;[Mana Bombs] leave behind a pool of [Corrupted Mana] after detonating.
$bullet;Vexamus gains energy from absorbing [Arcane Orbs].

sections.title: Healers
sections.body_text:
$bullet;[Mana Bombs] leave behind a pool of [Corrupted Mana] after detonating.
$bullet;Vexamus gains energy from absorbing [Arcane Orbs].

2512.name: Overgrown Ancient
2512.description: Professors Mystakria and Ichistrasz have used just a touch too much magic in an effort to clear the botany labs. Now they have a big, leafy problem on their hands in the form of an Overgrown Ancient that threatens to undo all their hard work.

sections.title: Overview
sections.body_text:
The Overgrown Ancient attempts to crush the tank with [Barkbreaker] and repeatedly forces waves of dormant lashers to grow with [Germinate].

Upon reaching 100 energy, the Overgrown Ancient uses [Burst Forth] to awaken all dormant lashers that have not yet been killed, causing them to attack players.

sections.title: Tanks
sections.body_text:
$bullet;Being hit by [Barkbreaker] greatly increases Physical damage taken for a short time after.
$bullet;Once awakened by [Burst Forth], Hungry Lashers can inflict significant damage if left unchecked.
$bullet;Ancient Branches cast [Healing Touch], which can be interrupted.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.body_text:
$bullet;Hungry Lashers can be damaged and killed even before the Ancient awakens them with [Burst Forth].
$bullet;Ancient Branches cast [Healing Touch], which can be interrupted.

sections.title: Healers
sections.body_text:
$bullet;The target of [Barkbreaker] takes greatly increased Physical damage for a short time after being hit.
$bullet;[Burst Forth] inflicts significant damage to all party members.

2514.name: Echo of Doragosa
2514.description: Headteacher Doragosa thought of everything when it came to Algeth'ar Academy. Including a complex simulacrum of herself to take care of any day to day tasks and upkeep while the Isles lay dormant. Now that the Academy is open once again, perhaps she can use it to help keep track of all the new students. It's done a fine job in the interim, and is absolutely the one spell that did not degrade after all these years. Perfectly stable and helpful. Right?

sections.title: Overview
sections.body_text: The Echo of Doragosa assaults her enemies with powerful Arcane attacks, applying [Overwhelming Power] and creating [Arcane Rifts].

sections.title: Tanks
sections.body_text:
$bullet; Multiple applications of [Overwhelming Power] will create [Arcane Rifts].
$bullet; [Astral Blast] inflicts heavy arcane damage and applies an application of [Overwhelming Power].

sections.title: Healers
sections.body_text: $bullet; Multiple applications of [Overwhelming Power] will create [Arcane Rifts].

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.body_text:
$bullet; Multiple applications of [Overwhelming Power] will create [Arcane Rifts].
$bullet;

2655.name: Emberdawn
2655.description: Emberdawn settled in the gardens of Windrunner Spire after seeking a place to raise her young. Highly territorial, she guards her nest with a searing ferocity.

sections.title: Overview
sections.body_text: Emberdawn lights the winds aflame as she protects her nest. [Burning Gale] pushes players and lights [Ignited Embers], creating [Flaming Twisters] that sweep across the garden.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.body_text:
$bullet;[Flaming Updraft] leaves behind a [Ignited Embers] upon expiration.

$bullet;[Burning Gale] pushes players and causes [Ignited Embers] to create [Flaming Twisters].

sections.title: Healer
sections.body_text:
$bullet;[Flaming Updraft] inflicts significant damage to afflicted players.

$bullet;[Burning Gale] pushes players and causes [Ignited Embers] to create [Flaming Twisters].

sections.title: Tank
sections.body_text:
$bullet;Emberdawn's [Searing Beak] inflicts heavy Physical damage followed by significant Fire damage over time.

$bullet;[Burning Gale] pushes players and causes [Ignited Embers] to create [Flaming Twisters].

2656.name: Derelict Duo
2656.description: The banshee Kalis and her loyal abomination Latch lead a group of fanatical followers of Sylvanas Windrunner. They've come to the Spire in search of relics with any resonant essence of the Dark Lady, willing to do anything to obtain them.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.body_text:
$bullet;Latch's [Heaving Yank] interrupts and pulls in the first target it hits.
$bullet;Kalis's [Debilitating Shriek] continues to increase its Shadow damage until interrupted.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.body_text:
$bullet;Latch's [Heaving Yank] interrupts and pulls in the first target it hits.
$bullet;Kalis's [Curse of Darkness] causes Dark Entities to fixate upon players.

sections.title: Healer
sections.body_text:
$bullet;Kalis's [Debilitating Shriek] continues to increase its Shadow damage until interrupted.
$bullet;Latch's [Heaving Yank] interrupts and pulls in the first target it hits.

sections.title: Tank
sections.body_text:
$bullet;Latch's [Bone Hack] inflicts significant Physical damage.
$bullet;Latch's [Heaving Yank] interrupts and pulls in the first target it hits.

2657.name: Commander Kroluk
2657.description: Commander Kroluk once fought in the Second War, a conflict that ended the life of Alleria Windrunner's brother, Lirath. In her grief, Alleria slaughtered any Old Horde she could find. The vengeful spirits of those she defeated now haunt the Spire.

sections.title: Overview
sections.body_text:
Commander Kroluk crashes down on players with [Reckless Leap] and cuts them to pieces with [Rampage].

At 66% and 33% remaining health, Kroluk lets out a [Rallying Bellow] to summon a warparty.
Kroluk maintains [Shield Wall] until his warparty is defeated.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.body_text:
$bullet;[Rallying Bellow] summons a warparty to fight alongside Commander Kroluk.
$bullet;[Bladestorm] inflicts damage to all players within Commander Kroluk's path.

sections.title: Healer
sections.body_text:
$bullet;[Rallying Bellow] summons a warparty to fight alongside Commander Kroluk.
$bullet;[Reckless Leap] inflicts damage to players within the impact location.

sections.title: Tank
sections.body_text:
$bullet;[Rallying Bellow] summons a warparty to fight alongside Commander Kroluk.
$bullet;[Rampage] inflicts sustained damage to Commander Kroluk's current target.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.body_text:
$bullet;[Rallying Bellow] summons a warparty to fight alongside Commander Kroluk.
$bullet;[Bladestorm] inflicts damage to all players within Commander Kroluk's path.
$bullet;[Intimidating Shout] fears players who stand alone.

sections.title: Healer
sections.body_text:
$bullet;[Rallying Bellow] summons a warparty to fight alongside Commander Kroluk.
$bullet;[Reckless Leap] inflicts damage to players within the impact location.
$bullet;[Intimidating Shout] fears players standing alone.

sections.title: Tank
sections.body_text:
$bullet;[Rallying Bellow] summons a warparty to fight alongside Commander Kroluk.
$bullet;[Rampage] inflicts sustained damage to Commander Kroluk's current target.
$bullet;[Intimidating Shout] fears players standing alone.

2658.name: The Restless Heart
2658.description: Born from the grief and wrath of the Windrunner family, the vengeful spirit of a once-proud Ranger-General haunts the halls of its abandoned ancestral home. Only by facing a worthy foe can it be laid to rest and finally know peace.

sections.title: Overview
sections.body_text:
The Restless Heart assails players with [Arrow Rain] before focusing its fury on a player with [Bolt Gale].

Upon reaching 100 energy, the Restless Heart fires a wind-infused arrow that creates an expanding ring of [Billowing Wind].

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.body_text:
$bullet;[Turbulent Arrows] knock players into the air when touched, removing [Squall Leap].
$bullet;[Bullseye Windblast] creates an expanding ring of [Billowing Wind].
$bullet;[Gust Shot] destroys any [Storming Soulfonts] struck.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.body_text:
$bullet;[Turbulent Arrows] knock players into the air when touched, removing [Squall Leap].
$bullet;[Bullseye Windblast] creates an expanding ring of [Billowing Wind].
$bullet;[Bolt Gale] launches a continuous volley of arrows towards a player.

sections.title: Healer
sections.body_text:
$bullet;[Bolt Gale] inflicts heavy damage to the targeted player.
$bullet;[Turbulent Arrows] knock players into the air when touched, removing [Squall Leap].
$bullet;[Gust Shot] destroys any [Storming Soulfonts] struck.

sections.title: Healer
sections.body_text:
$bullet;[Bolt Gale] inflicts heavy damage to the targeted player.
$bullet;[Turbulent Arrows] knock players into the air when touched, removing [Squall Leap].
$bullet;[Bullseye Windblast] creates an expanding ring of [Billowing Wind].

sections.title: Tank
sections.body_text:
$bullet;[Tempest Slash] knocks The Restless Heart's primary target away and briefly increases their Physical damage taken.
$bullet;[Turbulent Arrows] knock players into the air when touched, removing [Squall Leap].
$bullet;[Gust Shot] destroys any [Storming Soulfonts] struck.

sections.title: Tank
sections.body_text:
$bullet;[Tempest Slash] knocks The Restless Heart's primary target away and briefly increases their Physical damage taken.
$bullet;[Turbulent Arrows] knock players into the air when touched, removing [Squall Leap].
$bullet;[Bullseye Windblast] creates an expanding ring of [Billowing Wind].

2659.name: Arcanotron Custos
2659.description: This highly advanced arcane construct has been charged with keeping the peace and ensuring that all Magisters adhere to rules and restrictions. Veering from said rules will not be tolerated.

sections.title: Overview
sections.body_text: Arcanotron Custos controls players with its [Ethereal Shackles] and by creating pools of [Arcane Residue]. Upon running out of energy, Arcanotron Custos begins its [Refueling Protocol], drawing in [Energy Orbs] to refuel itself.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.body_text:
$bullet;[Arcane Expulsion] inflicts a heavy amount of damage and knocks back all players.
$bullet;[Arcane Residue] inflicts heavy damage to players standing in the area.
$bullet; Arcanotron Custos gains [Arcane Empowerment] if an Energy Orb reaches it.

sections.title: Healers
sections.body_text:
$bullet;[Ethereal Shackles] roots players and inflicts periodic damage.
$bullet;[Arcane Residue] inflicts heavy damage to players standing in the area.
$bullet; Arcanotron Custos gains [Arcane Empowerment] if an Energy Orb reaches it.

sections.title: Tanks
sections.body_text:
$bullet;[Repulsing Slam] inflicts a heavy amount of damage and knocks back its target.
$bullet;[Arcane Residue] inflicts heavy damage to players standing in the area.
$bullet; Arcanotron Custos gains [Arcane Empowerment] if an Energy Orb reaches it.

2660.name: Gemellus
2660.description: An otherworldly spawn of Void origins, Gemellus seems to utilize the Void not only for its own protection, but to propigate and foster the development of its species as well.

sections.title: Overview
sections.body_text: At the start of the encounter and 50% remaining health, Gemellus uses [Triplicate] to create clones that drift around the arena. Gemellus and its clones are bound by a [Synaptic Nexus] and act as one.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.body_text:
$bullet;[Astral Grasp] pulls players towards their respective Gemellus.
$bullet;[Cosmic Sting] inflicts heavy damage and creates [Void Secretions].

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.body_text:
$bullet;[Astral Grasp] pulls players towards their respective Gemellus.
$bullet;[Cosmic Sting] inflicts heavy damage and creates [Void Secretions].

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.body_text:
$bullet;[Astral Grasp] pulls players towards their respective Gemellus.
$bullet;[Cosmic Sting] inflicts moderate damage and creates [Void Secretions] upon expiration.

sections.title: Healers
sections.body_text:
$bullet;[Cosmic Sting] inflicts heavy damage and creates [Void Secretions].
$bullet;[Astral Grasp] pulls players towards their respective Gemellus.

sections.title: Healers
sections.body_text:
$bullet;[Cosmic Sting] inflicts heavy damage and creates [Void Secretions].
$bullet;[Astral Grasp] pulls players towards their respective Gemellus.

sections.title: Healers
sections.body_text:
$bullet;[Cosmic Sting] inflicts moderate damage and creates [Void Secretions] upon expiration.
$bullet;[Astral Grasp] pulls players towards their respective Gemellus.

sections.title: Tanks
sections.body_text:
$bullet;[Astral Grasp] pulls players towards their respective Gemellus.
$bullet;[Cosmic Sting] inflicts heavy damage and creates [Void Secretions].

$bullet;[Astral Grasp] pulls players towards their respective Gemellus.
$bullet;[Cosmic Sting] inflicts heavy damage and creates [Void Secretions].

sections.title: Tanks
sections.body_text:
$bullet;[Astral Grasp] pulls players towards their respective Gemellus.
$bullet;[Cosmic Sting] inflicts moderate damage and creates [Void Secretions] upon expiration.

2661.name: Seranel Sunlash
2661.description: An accomplished Spellbreaker, Serenel Sunlash has earned the full trust of the Magisters. Charged with the protection of the Cynosure of Twilight, Seranel will fulfill those duties with his very life if necessary.

sections.title: Overview
sections.body_text:
Seranel assaults players with [Suppression Zones] that cause [Feedback] to players affected by [Runic Mark].

Upon reaching 100 energy, Seranel causes an [Wave of Silence] silencing and pacifying players outside of [Suppression Zones].

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.body_text:
$bullet;[Wave of Silence] inflicts heavy damage and silences players outside of [Suppression Zones].
$bullet;[Runic Mark] inflicts moderate damage to nearby players.
$bullet;[Suppression Zone] and [Feedback] silences and pacifies players.

sections.title: Healers
sections.body_text:
$bullet;[Wave of Silence] inflicts heavy damage and silences players outside of [Suppression Zones].
$bullet;[Runic Mark] inflicts moderate damage to nearby players.
$bullet;[Suppression Zone] and [Feedback] silences and pacifies players.

sections.title: Tanks
sections.body_text:
$bullet;[Hastening Ward] increases Seranel's attack speed and causes his melee attacks to inflict additional Arcane damage.
$bullet;[Wave of Silence] inflicts heavy damage and silences players outside of [Suppression Zones].
$bullet;[Runic Mark] inflicts moderate damage to nearby players.

2662.name: Degentrius
2662.description: A powerful creature of the Void, Degentrius has taken advantage of the opportunity inadvertently provided by Magister Umbric and launched an assault on the Terrace.

item.name: Formula: Enchant Chest - Mark of the Magister
Formula: Enchant Weapon - Flames of the Sin'dorei

sections.title: Overview
sections.body_text: Degentrius leads the assault from atop Magisters' Terrace, commanding the platform with overwhelming Void magic. [Void Torrent] streams carve across the arena as they flow into Degentrius, while [Unstable Void Essence]s ricochet around the platform.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.body_text:
$bullet; If there are no players standing under [Unstable Void Essence]  when it impacts, damage will be inflicted to all players.
$bullet; [Void Torrent]  inflicts moderate damage and stuns any players that come into contact with it.

sections.title: Healers
sections.body_text:
$bullet; [Devouring Entropy] creates Entropy Orbs upon removal.
$bullet; If there are no players standing under [Unstable Void Essence]  when it impacts, damage will be inflicted to all players.
$bullet; [Void Torrent]  inflicts moderate damage and stuns any players that come into contact with it.

sections.title: Tanks
sections.body_text:
$bullet; [Null Bomb] will inflict massive damage to all players if it is not triggered by a player.
$bullet; If there are no players standing under [Unstable Void Essence]  when it impacts, damage will be inflicted to all players.
$bullet; [Void Torrent]  inflicts moderate damage and stuns any players that come into contact with it.

2733.name: Imperator Averzian
2733.description: Imperator Averzian wages a relentless campaign, seeking not conquest, but annihilation. His entire will is bent to a singular ambition: to rend the veil between worlds and carve a breach into the Void itself. Through this wound, his infinite host shall pour forth, drowning Azeroth in darkness.

sections.title: Overview
sections.body_text:
Averzian uses [Shadow's Advance] to claim territory on the battlefield. Territory claimed cannot be retaken, and if Averzian claims three adjacent territories in a row he unleashes the [March of the Endless].

Causing an [Umbral Collapse] on a territory being taken prevents its capture.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.body_text:
$bullet; Abyssal Voidshapers attempt to use [Gathering Darkness] at full power.
$bullet; Shadowguard Stalwarts attempt to empower their allies with [Pitch Bulwark].

sections.title: Healers
sections.body_text:
$bullet;[Dark Upheaval] inflicts periodic damage to all players.
$bullet;[Umbral Collapse] inflicts damage to everyone that is reduced by the number of players at the impact location.

sections.title: Tanks
sections.body_text:
$bullet; Averzian gains [Imperator's Glory] while close to territory he controls.
$bullet; When Averzian strikes his current target he infects them with [Blackening Wounds].

sections.title: Abyssal Voidshaper
sections.body_text: On Heroic difficulty, Abyssal Voidshapers cast [Gathering Darkness] to transform into Obscurion Endwalkers.

sections.title: Voidmaw
sections.body_text: On Heroic difficulty, at 35% health remaining the Voidmaw crawls towards the nearest void-claimed space to restore its health.

sections.title: Abyssal Voidshaper
sections.body_text: On Mythic difficulty, Abyssal Voidshapers cast [Gathering Darkness] to transform into Obscurion Endwalkers. In addition, they also cast [Cosmic Shell] to become immune to [Umbral Collapse].

sections.title: Voidmaw
sections.body_text: On Mythic difficulty, at 35% health remaining the Voidmaw rushes towards the nearest void-claimed space to restore its health.

2734.name: Vorasius
2734.description: A colossal predator born in the wastes of the Voidstorm, Vorasius grew to an incredible size fueled by an endless hunger. Summoned to the battle raging at the base of the Voidspire by Voidlight Everdawn, this colossal monster now feasts on both sides.

sections.title: Overview
sections.body_text:
Vorasius periodically strikes the ground with [Shadowclaw Slam], creating crystals that divide the battlefield. The behemoth then shakes off parasitic creeps that explode in a [Blisterburst] upon death.

As the battle rages, Vorasius sweeps his deadly [Void Breath] from one side of the battlefield to the other, decimating anything caught in its path.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.body_text:
$bullet; The explosion of [Blisterburst]  is powerful enough to damage Void Crystals.

$bullet; [Shadowclaw Slam] causes reverberating [Aftershocks] from its impact location.

sections.title: Healers
sections.body_text:
$bullet; The explosion of [Blisterburst]  is powerful enough to damage Void Crystals.

$bullet; [Primordial Roar] causes Vorasius to gain more [Primordial Power] with each cast.

sections.title: Tanks
sections.body_text:
$bullet; [Shadowclaw Slam] inflicts deadly damage to the raid if it fails to hit at least one player.

$bullet; [Overpowering Pulse] is triggered when no enemies are near Vorasius.

sections.title: Blistercreep
sections.body_text: A parasitic spawn that fixates on a player.

sections.title: Void Crystal
sections.body_text: Dark crystals that divide the battlefield. Strong enough to withstand anything but the explosions of [Blisterburst].

2735.name: Vaelgor & Ezzorak
2735.description: Born as clutchmates in the red dragonflight, Vaelgor and Ezzorak were once the guardians of all living things. Now, twisted by the dark will of Xal'atath, all that remains of their former selves is their unyielding bond to one another.

sections.title: Overview
sections.body_text:
The dragon siblings begin battle alternating between flying and grounded combat, swapping after [Midnight Flames] at full power. In response, the Lightbound Vanguard offer aid by providing their [Radiant Barrier] to nearby players.

Eventually, both dragons land, combining their draconic might to annihilate players once and for all.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.body_text: $bullet;[Gloom] applies [Gloomtouched] upon contact and shrinks the [Gloomfield] formed.

sections.title: Healers
sections.body_text:
$bullet;The Lightbound Vanguard grant [Radiant Barrier] to players nearby, reducing [Midnight Flames]' high damage.
$bullet;[Gloomtouched] players decrease the total damage inflicted by [Gloom] and shrink the [Gloomfield] formed.

sections.title: Tanks
sections.body_text:
$bullet;[Rakfang] and [Vaelwing] empower the dragon when cast at the same target.
$bullet;Receiving [Nullbeam] stacks decrease the [Nullzone]'s pull magnitude for all players.

sections.title: Lightbound Vanguard
sections.body_text: If present, War Chaplain Senn, General Amias Bellamy, and/or Commander Venel Lightblood join in the battle against Vaelgor & Ezzorak.

2736.name: Fallen-King Salhadaar
2736.description: After turning on Xal'atath, the fallen king Salhadaar has become a captive of the very Shadowguard he once commanded. Tortured, delirious, and infused with the Void, he awaits his death--or a chance to win his people's freedom from Xal'atath's grasp.

sections.title: Overview
sections.body_text:
Fallen-King Salhadaar is infused with power from the surrounding machinery, slowly increasing his energy over time. Upon reaching 100 energy, he is overwhelmed by the Void and begins his [Entropic Unraveling]. 

Periodically, the Riftlabs produce orbs of Concentrated Void that are drawn toward Salhadaar. When an orb of Concentrated Void reaches him, he performs a [Void Infusion].

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.body_text:
$bullet; Orbs of Concentrated Void cause a [Void Infusion] when they reach Salhadaar.
$bullet; Salhadaar takes increased damage during [Entropic Unraveling].
$bullet; Salhadaar creates several Fractured Images that cast [Shadow Fracture].

sections.title: Healers
sections.body_text:
$bullet; When orbs of Concentrated Void are destroyed, they apply [Dark Radiation] to all players.
$bullet; [Despotic Command] inflicts periodic damage to nearby players and applies [Oppressive Darkness] when removed.
$bullet; [Entropic Unraveling] inflicts heavy periodic damage to all players.

sections.title: Tanks
sections.body_text:
$bullet; Orbs of Concentrated Void cause a [Void Infusion] when they reach Salhadaar.
$bullet; Spikes erupt from the target of [Shattering Twilight].
$bullet; Salhadaar's melee attacks apply [Destabilizing Strikes].

sections.title: Concentrated Void
sections.body_text: An orb of dark energy that is drawn towards Salhadaar.

sections.title: Concentrated Void
sections.body_text: An orb of dark energy that is drawn towards Salhadaar.

sections.title: Concentrated Void
sections.body_text: An orb of dark energy that is drawn toward Salhadaar.

sections.title: Enduring Void
sections.body_text: An orb remnant of dark energy that is drawn toward Salhadaar. Reactivated during [Void Convergence].

2737.name: Lightblinded Vanguard
2737.description: Once paragons of the Light, Senn, Bellamy, and Lightblood have surrendered to their own blinding zealotry--their faith perverted into a ruthless fanaticism that now compels them to smite all who oppose them.

sections.title: Overview
sections.body_text:
The Lightblinded Vanguard attacks players relentlessly as their energy slowly increases.

When a member of the Vanguard reaches 100 energy, they activate an Aura to empower their allies and unleash their most devastating attack.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.body_text:
$bullet; War Chaplain Senn protects allies within her [Aura of Peace], pacifying any players who attack them.
$bullet; Damage from [Execution Sentence] is split evenly between all players hit.
$bullet; [Sacred Shield] grants immunity to interrupt effects while the shield holds.

sections.title: Healers
sections.body_text:
$bullet; [Tyr's Wrath] absorbs a large amount of healing done to affected players.
$bullet; Damage from [Execution Sentence] is split evenly between all players hit.
$bullet; General Bellamy silences players struck by [Divine Toll].

sections.title: Tanks
sections.body_text:
$bullet; [Judgment] significantly increases damage taken from [Final Verdict] and [Shield of the Righteous].
$bullet; Damage from [Execution Sentence] is split evenly between all players hit.
$bullet; Members of the Vanguard with an active Aura greatly empower their nearby allies.

2738.name: Crown of the Cosmos
2738.description: High atop the Voidspire, Xal'atath marshalls her dark army from across the Voidstorm. Aided by Turalyon, Arator, and Alleria, the mortals of Azeroth must confront her before she unleashes the might of the Voidspire against her enemies.

sections.title: Overview
sections.body_text:
Alleria Windrunner begins the fight held back by Undying Sentinels from the Void. She periodically strikes out at friend and foe alike with both Void effects and [Silverstrike Arrow]. 

When each of the Undying Sentinels have been destroyed, Alleria crashes into the platform and creates a Rift Simulacrum to assault her enemies with [Call of the Void] and [Ranger Captain's Mark].

When the Rift Simulacrum is shattered, Alleria releases her full Void abilities upon all players.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.body_text:
$bullet;[Silverstrike Arrow] will remove any Void effects from targets struck.
$bullet;Void Droplet will splash targets with [Corrupting Essence] when it dies.
$bullet;[Aspect of the End] reduces healing received until the target moves away from the arrow.

sections.title: Healers
sections.body_text:
$bullet;[Silverstrike Arrow] will remove any Void effects from targets struck.
$bullet;[Null Corona] absorbs a large amount of healing and can be moved to another player when dispelled.
$bullet;[Aspect of the End] reduces healing received until the target moves away from the arrow.

sections.title: Tanks
sections.body_text:
$bullet;Undying Sentinels utilize [Echoing Darkness] when no players are in melee combat.
$bullet;[Empowering Darkness] affects Alleria's allies within a large area.
$bullet;[Aspect of the End] reduces healing received and [Gravity Collapse] leaves the target weak to Physical attacks.

sections.title: Tanks
sections.body_text:
$bullet;Undying Sentinels utilize [Echoing Darkness] when no players are in melee combat.
$bullet;[Empowering Darkness] affects Alleria's allies within a large area.
$bullet;[Aspect of the End] reduces healing received and [Gravity Collapse] leaves the target weak to Physical attacks.

sections.title: Undying Sentinels
sections.body_text: Undying Sentinels are inexorably linked to their void portals, teleporting back if they are more than 25 yards away from them.

sections.title: Rift Simulacrum
sections.body_text: Alleria utilizes her Spatial Rift to summon forth a void simulacrum to assist her.

sections.title: Stage Three: The End of the End
Undying Sentinels
sections.body_text: Undying Sentinels are inexorably linked to their void portals, teleporting back if they are more than 25 yards away from them.

sections.title: Stage Two: The End of the End
sections.body_text: Wild cosmic energy spirals out of control, sealing the fate of all atop the Voidspire...

2739.name: Belo'ren, Child of Al'ar
2739.description: One of the last clutch of Al'ar, Belo'ren was raised for the purpose of protecting the Isle of Quel'Danas. In the aftermath of the Voidspire, Belo'ren has been irradiated by Void. Confused and freshly hatched, the phoenix is focused on its sole task: Keep any invaders from reaching the Sunwell.

sections.title: Overview
sections.body_text:
Belo'ren guards the Sunwell with both Light and Void magic. His [Voidlight Convergence] infuses players with either Light or Void, protecting them from one while leaving them vulnerable to the other.

When his health is depleted, Belo'ren retreats into an ashen egg and begins to cast [Rebirth]. Players must damage Belo'ren to diminish his [Immortal Flame] before he is reborn anew.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.body_text:
$bullet; [Light Feather] reduces incoming Holy damage. [Void Feather] reduces incoming Shadow damage.
$bullet; Damage from [Light Dive] and [Void Dive] is split evenly between all players hit.

sections.title: Healers
sections.body_text:
$bullet; [Light Feather] reduces incoming Holy damage. [Void Feather] reduces incoming Shadow damage.
$bullet; [Light Burn] and [Void Burn] absorb significant healing and inflict damage over time until fully healed.

sections.title: Tanks
sections.body_text:
$bullet; [Light Feather] reduces incoming Holy damage. [Void Feather] reduces incoming Shadow damage.
$bullet; Failing to hit a player with [Guardian's Edict] empowers Belo'ren, significantly increasing his damage.

sections.title: Stage One: Phoenix Reborn
sections.body_text: Belo'ren ascends in his majestic phoenix form wielding the power of the radiant Light and devouring Void.

sections.title: Stage Two: Ashen Shell
sections.body_text: As Belo'ren falls he retreats into an ashen egg and kindles the fire of rebirth.

2740.name: Midnight Falls
2740.description: Once a creature of Light, L'ura fell to the Void long ago on Argus, her essence siphoned by Alleria Windrunner in the Seat of the Triumvirate. Freed from her bindings, L'ura's dark energies now threaten the very Sunwell itself.

item.name: March on Quel'Danas Vanquisher's Argent Trophy
March on Quel'Danas Vanquisher's Gleaming Trophy
March on Quel'Danas Vanquisher's Aureate Trophy

sections.title: Overview
sections.body_text:
The Dark Naaru counts down the minutes with each harrowing toll of [Death's Dirge] that echoes off the sacred walls. [Heaven's Glaives] rip and tear through the armies of light as L'ura conducts the infinite power held within [The Darkwell] to extinguish all that is holy.

When [Midnight] falls and Azeroth descends into darkness, brave [Torchbearers] emerge from the shadows to face [The Dark Archangel] and fight to see another sunrise.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.body_text:
$bullet;Midnight Crystals undergo [Cosmic Fracture] if not destroyed in time.
$bullet;[Death's Dirge] displays [Dark Runes] that correspond to the melody's notes.
$bullet;[Torchbearers] emit light to protect nearby allies from [Midnight].

sections.title: Healers
sections.body_text:
$bullet;[Dimming] Dusk Crystals transform into Dawn Crystals upon reaching full health.
$bullet;[Death's Dirge] displays [Dark Runes] that correspond to the melody's notes.
$bullet;[Torchbearers] emit light to protect nearby allies from [Midnight].

sections.title: Tanks
sections.body_text:
$bullet;[Heaven's Lance] inflicts massive damage as the target is [Impaled].
$bullet;[Death's Dirge] displays [Dark Runes] that correspond to the melody's notes.
$bullet;[Torchbearers] emit light to protect nearby allies from [Midnight].

sections.title: Stage One: Final Tolls
sections.body_text: The clock ticks. The sun sets. The candle burns.

sections.title: Midnight Crystal
sections.body_text: A dark Naaru fragment beyond saving.

sections.title: Dusk Crystal
sections.body_text: A dimming Naaru fragment that may be restored.

sections.title: Dawn Crystal
sections.body_text: A purified Naaru fragment that can be held by players.

sections.body_text: Witness the light fade and fracture.

sections.body_text: Venture into the engine of desolation.

sections.body_text: Time is up. Can you end the ending itself?

2782.name: Cragpine
2782.description: Ancient as the cliffs themselves, Cragpine has slumbered for centuries beneath a canopy of towering pines. Now stirred by the careless intrusion of mortals, he rises to defend his glade, bending the forest itself to his will.

sections.title: Overview
sections.body_text:
Cragpine calls upon the treants of Zul'Aman with [Rootquake] as he shakes the earth beneath his feet.

The forest itself answers his call as he awakens [Ancient Seeds] slumbering in the soil.

sections.title: Healers
sections.body_text:
$bullet;[Rootquake] inflicts heavy damage to all players.
$bullet;Floating [Ancient Seeds] inflict damage to nearby players.

sections.title: Tanks
sections.body_text:
$bullet;Cragpine inflicts heavy melee damage while wielding a [War Club].
$bullet;Angry treants pursue players endlessly until destroyed.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.body_text:
$bullet;Angry treants pursue players endlessly until destroyed.
$bullet;Floating [Ancient Seeds] inflict damage to nearby players.

sections.title: Angry Treant
sections.body_text: This treant fixates on a nearby player after being rudely awakened.

2795.name: Chimaerus the Undreamt God
2795.description: When Aln'hara was taken from her Cradle, only pain and madness were left to shape the chaos of the rift. Chimaerus feasted on the void left behind, gorging itself on other nightmarish manifestations. Now it stands as the monster within the rift: a being of agony and rage.

sections.title: Overview
sections.body_text:
Chimaerus wrenches its enemies into the Rift during [Alndust Upheaval] where they must contend with aberrant Manifestations shielded by [Alnshroud]. Manifestations that lose their shroud emerge into Reality and move towards the [Insatiable] Chimaerus.

Upon reaching 100 energy, Chimaerus takes to the skies with [Corrupted Devastation] while summoning Manifestations below.

sections.title: Tanks
sections.body_text:
$bullet; [Alndust Upheaval] allows players to see into the Aln and attack Manifestations.
$bullet; Coalesced Manifestations afflict the raid with [Rift Sickness].
$bullet; Manifestations in Reality move toward [Insatiable] Chimaerus.
$bullet; Colossal Horrors unleash a series of [Colossal Strikes] against their current target.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.body_text:
$bullet; [Alndust Upheaval] allows players to see into the Aln and attack Manifestations.
$bullet; Coalesced Manifestations afflict the raid with [Rift Sickness].
$bullet; Manifestations in Reality move toward [Insatiable] Chimaerus.

sections.title: Healers
sections.body_text:
$bullet; Coalesced Manifestations afflict the raid with [Rift Sickness].
$bullet; [Alndust Upheaval] allows players to see into the Aln and attack Manifestations.
$bullet; Players within the Rift who are affected by [Alnsight] cannot interact with allies.

sections.title: Swarming Shade
sections.body_text: A swarming horror called from the Rift.

sections.title: Swarming Shade
sections.body_text: A swarming horror called from the Rift.

sections.title: Swarming Shade
sections.body_text: A swarming horror called from the Rift.

2810.name: Muro'jin and Nekraxx
2810.description: Muro'jin is a relentless tracker, charged with capturing victims for the Vilebranch's dark rites. Nekraxx, a reanimated eagle, strikes down any who resist capture by her master. They must not be allowed to supply souls for Vordaza's necrotic magic any longer.

sections.title: Overview
sections.body_text:
The cunning duo of Muro'jin and Nekraxx fight as one, assailing players with an array of combined tactics.

Muro'jin withers players down with [Barrage] while Nekraxx flings a salvo of feathers with [Fetid Quillstorm].

As Muro'jin scatters [Freezing Traps] across the arena, Nekraxx barrels forward with [Carrion Swoop].

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.body_text:
$bullet;Muro'jin attempts to [Revive Pet] upon Nekraxx's defeat, and Nekraxx enters [Bestial Wrath] upon Muro'jin's defeat.
$bullet;Muro'jin's [Freezing Traps] encase players in ice upon contact. Players encased in ice can intercept Nekraxx's [Carrion Swoop].
$bullet;Muro'jin's [Barrage] follows the targeted player and affects all players in a frontal cone.

sections.title: Healers
sections.body_text:
$bullet;Nekraxx's [Infected Pinions] inflicts significant damage to all players.
$bullet;Muro'jin's [Freezing Traps] encase players in ice upon contact. Players encased in ice can intercept Nekraxx's [Carrion Swoop].
$bullet;Muro'jin's [Barrage] follows the targeted player and affects all players in a frontal cone.

sections.title: Tank
sections.body_text:
$bullet;Muro'jin's [Flanking Spear] both repositions behind his current target and applies [Open Wound].
$bullet;Muro'jin's [Freezing Traps] encase players in ice upon contact. Players encased in ice can intercept Nekraxx's [Carrion Swoop].
$bullet;Nekraxx's [Carrion Swoop] affects all players in its path, inflicting damage and knocking them upwards.

2811.name: Vordaza
2811.description: Vordaza, the Vilebranch's master of souls, performs forbidden rites to extract the soul essences of the dead. She distills the suffering of her victims into raw necrotic energy to empower Rak'tul, her monstrous creation. Her vile magic and her monster must be stopped.

sections.title: Overview
sections.body_text:
Vordaza blasts players with necrotic energy while manipulating spirits with [Wrest Phantoms] to perform her bidding.

As the fight progresses, Vordaza invokes a [Necrotic Convergence], concentrating soul energy into volatile masses until interrupted.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.body_text:
$bullet;Vordaza summons Unstable Phantoms with [Wrest Phantoms] that chase players with [Final Pursuit].
$bullet;Unstable Phantoms afflict all players with [Lingering Dread] when defeated.
$bullet;While [Deathshroud] holds, Vordaza is unable to be interrupted.

sections.title: Healers
sections.body_text:
$bullet;Vordaza summons Unstable Phantoms with [Wrest Phantoms] that chase players with [Final Pursuit].
$bullet;Unstable Phantoms afflict all players with [Lingering Dread] when defeated.
$bullet;[Drain Soul] inflicts heavy damage to Vordaza's current target and absorbs healing received.

sections.title: Tank
sections.body_text:
$bullet;Vordaza summons Unstable Phantoms with [Wrest Phantoms] that chase players with [Final Pursuit].
$bullet;Unstable Phantoms afflict all players with [Lingering Dread] when defeated.
$bullet;[Drain Soul] inflicts heavy damage to Vordaza's current target and absorbs healing received.

2812.name: Rak'tul, Vessel of Souls
2812.description: An undead thrall bound to Vordaza, Rak'tul is grotesquely bloated with the essences of tormented souls and necrotic power. Drunk on his newfound power and driven mad by the souls' endless suffering, Rak'tul stands ready to break Zul'Aman beneath the crushing weight of his fists.

sections.title: Overview
sections.body_text:
Rak'tul batters players with [Spiritbreaker] and [Crush Souls], forming totems that [Soulbind] his foes.

As the fight progresses, Rak'tul unleashes a [Soulrending Roar], casting players' souls into the Restless Masses and afflicting them with [Withering Soul] until they return to the realm of the living.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.body_text:
$bullet;Totems spawn at each [Crush Souls] target's location and cast [Soulbind] at a player.
$bullet;[Soulrending Roar] applies [Withering Soul] until players return to the realm of the living.
$bullet;Interrupting [Eternal Suffering] grants [Spectral Residue].

sections.title: Healers
sections.body_text:
$bullet;Totems spawn at each [Crush Souls] target's location and cast [Soulbind] at a player.
$bullet;[Soulrending Roar] applies [Withering Soul] until players return to the realm of the living.
$bullet;[Deathgorged Vessel] inflicts heavy damage to all players.

sections.title: Tank
sections.body_text:
$bullet;Totems spawn at each [Crush Souls] target's location and cast [Soulbind] at a player.
$bullet;[Soulrending Roar] applies [Withering Soul] until players return to the realm of the living.
$bullet;[Spiritbreaker] inflicts heavy damage to Rak'tul's primary target, launching them into the air.

2813.name: Chief Corewright Kasreth
2813.description: Chief Corewright Kasreth and the Shadowguard Ethereals once upheld flawless energy flow within the Nexus-Point's Corespark Engine. But Lothraxion's radiant disruption shattered their balance. Now, cloaked in mistrust and weary of outsiders, they labor to restore the arcane harmony that once sustained the Nexus-Point.

sections.title: Overview
sections.body_text: Kasreth's Corespark Engine ebbs and flows with arcane energies, forming [Leyline Arrays] between the conduits around the room. The Corewright is a mastermind of circuitry, overwhelming a player with [Reflux Charge]. At 100 energy, Kasreth picks up a corespark and overcharges it in the engine, unleashing a [Corespark Detonation] at the impact location.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.body_text:
$bullet;[Reflux Charge] inflicts damage until overloaded.
$bullet;[Leyline Arrays] link randomly between conduits around the room and inflict heavy damage when crossing.
$bullet;[Flux Collapse] launches a continuous flow of arcane towards a player.

sections.title: Healers
sections.body_text:
$bullet;[Reflux Charge] inflicts damage until overloaded.
$bullet;[Leyline Arrays] link randomly between conduits around the room and inflict heavy damage when crossing.
$bullet;[Flux Collapse] launches a continuous flow of arcane towards a player.

sections.title: Tanks
sections.body_text:
$bullet;[Reflux Charge] inflicts damage until overloaded.
$bullet;[Leyline Arrays] link randomly between conduits around the room and inflict heavy damage when crossing.
$bullet;[Flux Collapse] launches a continuous flow of arcane towards a player.

2814.name: Corewarden Nysarra
2814.description: Corewarden Nysarra guards Nexus-Point Xenas with waning strength. Lightscarred by Lothraxion's assault, she broods in her wing, wounded and waiting. The Nullward stirs with battle, and her wrath sharpens for any who dare approach.

sections.title: Overview
sections.body_text: Scarred by her struggle with Lothraxion, Fractured Images continue to assault the Corewarden, erupting in bursts of [Lightscar Flare]. Nysarra calls upon the remnants of her shattered command to defend and suppress players while she slips through the shadows with [Eclipsing Step] and empowers her twin nullblades to unleash [Umbral Lash].

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.body_text:
$bullet; Corewarden Nysarra calls to her subordinates to assist during battle.
$bullet;[Eclipsing Step] carves into nearby players in addition to the targeted victim.
$bullet;[Lightscar Flare] stuns as the Fractured Image strikes its target and the resulting wound surges with Holy energy, providing power to those standing within it.

sections.title: Healers
sections.body_text:
$bullet; Corewarden Nysarra calls to her subordinates to assist during battle.
$bullet;[Eclipsing Step] carves into nearby players in addition to the targeted victim.
$bullet;[Lightscar Flare] stuns as the Fractured Image strikes its target and the resulting wound surges with Holy energy, providing power to those standing within it.

sections.title: Tanks
sections.body_text:
$bullet; Corewarden Nysarra calls to her subordinates to assist during battle.
$bullet;The power of [Umbral Lash] cleaves nearby players and applies [Void Gash].
$bullet;[Lightscar Flare] stuns as the Fractured Image strikes its target and the resulting wound surges with Holy energy, providing power to those standing within it.

2815.name: Lothraxion
2815.description: Blinded by betrayal, Lothraxion storms the Nexus-Point alone. With its defenses shattered, he prepares to breach the Nexus Core, risking a chain eruption that could annihilate Silvermoon and ripple across Azeroth itself.

sections.title: Overview
sections.body_text: Fractured Images of Lothraxion linger with every [Brilliant Dispersion], haunting the battlefield. These images [Flicker] and slice at nearby enemies with [Mirrored Rend]. When he reaches full power, Lothraxion flickers into hiding amongst his images and attempts to overload the core with [Divine Guile].

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.body_text:
$bullet; [Brilliant Dispersion] inflicts damage to all nearby players.
$bullet; Fractured Images unleash [Mirrored Rend] when standing too close.
$bullet; Lothraxion hides among his distorted images during [Divine Guile] until he is interrupted.

sections.title: Healers
sections.body_text:
$bullet; [Brilliant Dispersion] targets several players and inflicts damage to all nearby players when reaching its targeted destination.
$bullet; Fractured Images unleash [Mirrored Rend] when standing too close.
$bullet; Lothraxian hides among his distorted images during [Divine Guile] until he is interrupted.

sections.title: Tanks
sections.body_text:
$bullet; [Searing Rend] inflicts heavy Physical damage and leaves behind [Radiant Scars].
$bullet; Fractured Images unleash [Mirrored Rend] when standing too close.
$bullet; Lothraxian hides among his distorted images during [Divine Guile] until he is interrupted.

2827.name: Lu'ashal
2827.description: While the Lightbloom in Eversong has devastated much of the native wildlife, a few creatures have instead been strengthened by its power. Lu'ashal has grown to gargantuan size from the surging Holy energy and is now as dangerous as it is beautiful.

sections.title: Overview
sections.body_text: Lu'ashal assails foes in a holy frenzy, raining energy from the skies with [Radiant Sunder]  to shatter the ground that leave [Blinding Fissures] behind. During [Radiant Flare], she unleashes waves of [Radiant Embers] that travel across the battlefield.

sections.title: Healers
sections.body_text:
$bullet; [Dawncrazed Halo] inflicts moderate damage in an area around afflicted players.
$bullet; [Radiant Flare] inflicts substantial damage and casues [Radiant Embers] to erupt from [Blinding Fissures] .

sections.title: Tanks
sections.body_text:
$bullet; [Dawnfire Breath] inflicts heavy Radiant damage in a cone at the primary target.
$bullet; [Radiant Flare] inflicts substantial damage and casues [Radiant Embers] to erupt from [Blinding Fissures] .

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.body_text:
$bullet; [Dawncrazed Halo] inflicts moderate damage in an area around afflicted players.
$bullet; [Radiant Flare] inflicts substantial damage and casues [Radiant Embers] to erupt from [Blinding Fissures] .

2828.name: Predaxas
2828.description: Glutted on the writhing Voidstorm's spawn, Predaxas stalks the wilds hunting for prey. It does not rest, it does not reason, it devours with a hunger as insatiable as the dark.

sections.title: Overview
sections.body_text: Predaxas thrashes about the Gorging Pit ejecting his late lunch at foes with [Regurgitation] and crushing vermin with [Seismic Slam].

sections.title: Tanks
sections.body_text:
$bullet;[Regurgitation] ejects Predaxas' previous meals which attack players.
$bullet;[Seismic Slam] knocks back players and Predaxas' previous meals, causing additional effects.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.body_text:
$bullet;[Seismic Slam] knocks back players and Predaxas' previous meals, causing additional effects.
$bullet;Voidticks react to [Seismic Slam] triggering [Voidscatter].

sections.title: Healers
sections.body_text:
$bullet;Reguritated Bloodclaws periodically gain [Bestial Rage] inflicting increased damage.
$bullet;[Seismic Slam] knocks back players and Predaxas' previous meals, causing additional effects.

sections.title: Radiating Voidtick
sections.body_text: This blistercreep isn't aware why it is present but is more than content nibbling enemies.

2829.name: Thorm'belan
2829.description: Once a docile creature known to roam Harandar's southern wilds, Thorm'belan was forever changed when it became afflicted by The Lightbloom. The enraged beast must now be killed before it runs rampant across the surrounding wetlands.

sections.title: Overview
sections.body_text: Thorm'belan unleashes the power of the Light to assault the players. Periodically lobbing [Scintillating Shards] while also pulling players in towards itself with [Shredding Tendrils].

sections.title: Tanks
sections.body_text:
$bullet; [Scintillating Shard] causes all players to become stunned if it is not intercepted.
$bullet; [Shredding Tendrils] pulls players towards Thorm'belan and inflicts damage until players move far enough away from Thorm'belan.
$bullet; [Radiant Mote] damages and disorients nearby players when it expires.

sections.title: Healers
sections.body_text:
$bullet; [Scintillating Shard] causes all players to become stunned if it is not intercepted.
$bullet; [Shredding Tendrils] pulls players towards Thorm'belan and inflicts damage until players move far enough away from Thorm'belan.
$bullet; [Radiant Mote] damages and disorients nearby players when it expires.

$bullet; [Scintillating Shard] causes all players to become stunned if it is not intercepted.
$bullet; [Shredding Tendrils] pulls players towards Thorm'belan and inflicts damage until players move far enough away from Thorm'belan.
$bullet; [Radiant Mote] damages and disorients nearby players when it expires.
